case_title: PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. VS. NEIL OBRYANT et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF INTEREST AND ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: ZIDE, FLINT COREY SUBSTITUTED FOR PATENAUDE, RAYMOND A. AS ATTORNEY FOR PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT OBRYANT, NEIL DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-18-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-19-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-03-2005

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. SERVED JUL-26-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OBRYANT, NEIL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $203.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OBRYANT, NEIL

OVERPAYMENT, TRUST RECEIPT NO. 27131, TRAN # W1105719O012, TAG # 012622 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT CCP 585 ; ATTY. FEES AND COSTS ( CCP 1033 ) ; COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS ( EVID 1550 ) . FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OBRYANT, NEIL $2,267.82 PRINCIPAL, $203.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,471.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
